popularStory.headline: Life Sketch of Elizabeth Sherman
popularStory.description:
Elizabeth Sherman was born in June 1657, probably in Henrico County, Virginia.  She was the daughter of Henry Sherman and Cecily Farrar Hutchins.

     Elizabeth married Henry Trent in May 1672 in He …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hutchins於1612年8月3日出生在英國米德萊可雷迪其 聖 倫納德時，她的父親Captain Robert Hutchins28歲，母親Mary Farley20歲。她於大約1629年與William Coxe結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1665年12月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可瓦林納享年53歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州亨利可瓦林納亨利可 帕里什 邱奇 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hutchins于1612年8月3日出生在英国米德萊可雷迪其 聖 倫納德时，她的父亲Captain Robert Hutchins28岁，母亲Mary Farley20岁。她于大约1629年与William Coxe结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1665年12月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可瓦林納享年53岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州亨利可瓦林納亨利可 帕里什 邱奇 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hutcheon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s; see Houchin .

variants.name: Hutcheon
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Angus): variant of   Houchin  .

variants.name: Hutchings
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Hutchins  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: County seat
historicEvents.description: Varina was made Henrico county seat in 1634.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hutchins was born on 3 August 1612, in Shoreditch St Leonard, Middlesex, England, her father, Captain Robert Hutchins, was 28 and her mother, Mary Farley, was 20. She married William Coxe about 1629. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 14 December 1665, in Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 53, and was buried in Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hutchins est née le 3 août 1612, à Shoreditch St Leonard, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Captain Robert Hutchins, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Farley, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Coxe environ 1629. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 décembre 1665, à Varina, Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginie, États-Unis.

Lei sposato William Coxe circa 1629. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 14 dicembre 1665, nel Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hutchinsが1612年8月3日にイギリスミッドレセックスショアディトチ スト レオナルドで生まれた時，父Captain Robert Hutchinsは28歳，母Mary Farleyは20歳であった。約1629年にWilliam Coxeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1665年12月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコバーイナで53歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州ヘンリコバーイナヘンリコ パーイッシュ チャーチ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hutchins(이)가 1612년 8월 3일 영국 미들레세스 쇼레딧치 스트 리나르드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Captain Robert Hutchins(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Farley(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1629년 William Coxe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1665년 12월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코 바리나에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 헨리코 바리나 헨리코 파리시 처르치 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hutchins nasceu em 3 de agosto de 1612, em Shoreditch St Leonard, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Captain Robert Hutchins, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Farley, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Coxe aproximadamente 1629. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1665, em Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hutchins родилась 3 августа 1612 г. в местности шауредич ст леонард, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Captain Robert Hutchins было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Farley, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Coxe около 1629 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 14 декабря 1665 г. в местности варина, хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности хенрику пэриш чурч кеметири, варина, хенрику, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Hutchins nació el 3 de agosto de 1612, en Shoreditch St Leonard, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Captain Robert Hutchins, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mary Farley, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William Coxe aproximadamente 1629. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1665, en Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
